basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Landscape Officer, Divisional Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Landscape Officer, Divisional Accountant and More
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/BC 5 years, Physical Handicapped 10 years, Ex-Servicemen as per rules (deduct service period +3 years), Punjab Govt employees up to 45 years, widows/divorcees up to 40 years, contract employees equivalent to period worked.

qualification.details: Assistant Landscape Officer: B.Sc. (Agriculture) from a recognized University/Institution with Three years of experience in Landscaping and floriculture. Divisional Accountant: Commerce Graduate with 50% marks from a recognized University with Five years of experience in the relevant field in a University / Government Department / Recognized Educational Institution and Passing English and Punjabi type test with a speed of 30 wpm. Sr. Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University or Institution, qualifies in the competitive test, possesses at least one hundred and twenty hours course with hands-on experience in the use of Personal Computer or Information Technology in Office Productivity applications or Desktop Publishing applications from a Government recognized institution or a reputed institution which is ISO 9001 or equivalent to 'O' level certificate of DOEACC, passed test in English and Punjabi typewriting on computer at a speed of thirty words per minute.

salary_details.details: Assistant Landscape Officer: as per 7th CPC Divisional Accountant: as per 7th CPC Sr. Assistant: Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35400/-) as per 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for BFUHS Recruitment 2026 is 28 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the posts of Assistant Landscape Officer, Divisional Accountant, and Senior Assistant in BFUHS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts under BFUHS Recruitment 2026 is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the BFUHS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to these posts is 37 years, with applicable relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the Divisional Accountant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Divisional Accountant post, candidates must be a Commerce Graduate with 50% marks and have five years of relevant experience, along with typing test qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Sr. Assistant post offers a salary as per Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35400/-) of the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for BFUHS Recruitment 2026 typically involves a Written Test followed by the creation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification is for Punjab state. Candidates should check the official notification for specific eligibility regarding domicile.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official BFUHS website or the provided application link before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
